index.trust_text: Join thousands of fellow {country_name} residents who trade with {site_name}. We even display a live counter on our site showing how many people are trading right now, so you see our active community in real time.
index.trust_item_text_1: {site_name} is fully registered in {country_name} and follows all local financial regulations. This means we operate under strict rules to protect you.
index.trust_item_text_2: All your data and funds are encrypted and secured. We enforce strong account protection with SSL encryption and two-factor authentication. You can trade with confidence knowing we take security seriously.
index.trust_item_text_3: We don’t hide fees or add surprising rules. Before any trade, you see exactly what fees apply. We also clearly communicate the risks of trading. Honesty builds trust in our community.
index.trust_item_text_4: Our support team is based in {country_name} and speaks your language. They’re available via chat, phone, or email to help with any questions or issues.
